codeReview.summary: The task-crud-api feature is well-implemented with comprehensive test coverage. All required endpoints (POST, GET list, GET single, PATCH, DELETE) are implemented with proper validation, error handling, and status transition rules. The code follows project conventions using Hono, Drizzle ORM, and Zod validation. 36 of 37 tests pass; the one failing test is a test design issue (race condition in timestamp test with 1100ms delay) not an implementation bug.

issues.description: Test 'should update updated_at timestamp' uses 1100ms setTimeout which causes race condition with beforeEach cleanup when tests run concurrently. Test passes when run in isolation. Consider using a shorter delay or mocking the clock.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker correctly followed AGENTS.md conventions for status transitions. The VALID_STATUS_TRANSITIONS map in src/schemas/tasks.ts correctly implements the rules: backlog<->ready, ready<->in_progress, in_progress<->review, review<->done, any_status<->blocked.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: src/schemas/tasks.ts:23-33 - VALID_STATUS_TRANSITIONS matches AGENTS.md Task Status Transitions section exactly.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Error response format follows the documented convention of { error: string, details?: any } for validation errors.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: src/api/routes/tasks.ts:38-42 - Returns { error: 'Validation failed', details: validationResult.error.issues } for 400 errors.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The implementation correctly uses bun:sqlite with Drizzle ORM as specified in CLAUDE.md coding guidelines, avoiding better-sqlite3.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: src/db/connection.ts uses Database from 'bun:sqlite' and drizzle-orm for type-safe queries.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Activity logging integration was added to the task routes, showing the worker understood the relationship between task-crud-api and activity-logging features. The routes call logTaskCreated, logTaskUpdated, logTaskDeleted from the services layer.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: src/api/routes/tasks.ts imports and uses logging functions from src/services/taskLogs.ts at lines 88, 260-265, 314-321.

summary: The task-crud-api feature is complete and production-ready. All 5 endpoints are implemented with proper validation: POST /api/tasks creates tasks in 'backlog' status, GET /api/tasks supports filtering by project_id/status/agent_id, GET /api/tasks/:id returns single tasks, PATCH validates status transitions and returns 400 for invalid transitions, DELETE cascade-deletes logs via foreign key constraints. The 37 tests provide excellent coverage (36 pass, 1 has a race condition issue in the test itself). Code quality is high with proper TypeScript types, Zod validation, and consistent error handling.
